files.planningNote: Automake libasrc_la_SOURCES list. C build system; digiTS registers components via register-all.ts / core/registry.ts. No behavioral content. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

IFparm ASRCpTable[] param table + ASRCnames[]/size globals. Source of truth for the asrc param set (i/v parse-tree, temp/dtemp/tc1/tc2/reciproctc, and v41-new m/reciprocm). Counterpart is the B-source modelRegistry paramDefs. Absorbed into asrc#recon/wholeClass; the v41 m/reciprocm rows are blocked PENDING hunk h001.

ASRCacLoad — AC small-signal load. AC implemented (analysis-scope.md). Stamps the unit V-source quad + the precomputed derivative columns (ASRCacValues) scaled by temperature/multiplier factor. Counterpart is BSourceAnalogElement.stampAc(). Absorbed into the recon; blocked PENDING.

ASRCask integer-id IFparm value getter (temp/dtemp/tc1/tc2/m + output current/voltage/pos_node/neg_node). digiTS has no integer-id ask API; output quantities are exposed via getPinCurrents()/instance fields, params read by name from the property bag. Getter dispatch is C glue with no counterpart — hunks resolved NO-COUNTERPART per §5 case (a); the underlying readback quantities are part of the recon load/getPinCurrents, not this dispatch shell.

ASRCconvTest — reltol/voltTol(V)/abstol(I) convergence check on the parse-tree value vs ASRCprev_value. digiTS folds convergence into load() inline ctx.noncon increments (mosfet/diode/bjt pattern). Counterpart is the convergence flag in BSourceAnalogElement.load(). Absorbed into the recon; blocked PENDING.

sASRCinstance/sASRCmodel structs + ASRCvOld/ASRCcontVOld state #defines + ASRC_* id enum. Maps to the B-source StateSchema slots, instance fields (type/branch/parse-tree/vars/temp coeffs/m/posPtr), and paramDefs. v41 adds ASRCm/ASRCreciprocm fields + ASRCvars[] index cache + ASRC_M/ASRC_RM enum — blocked PENDING hunks h001/h002.
ASRCdelete — C heap free of the instance (INPfreeTree/FREE of acValues/posPtr/vars). JS is GC'd; no instance-teardown counterpart. PLANNING.md §4 (<dev>del.c) / §5 case (a).

ASRCdestroy — C heap free of the module-wide asrc_vals/asrc_derivs scratch buffers. JS is GC'd; the scratch arrays become element-local typed arrays with no explicit destroy. PLANNING.md §4 (<dev>dest.c) / §5 case (a).
C extern-prototype header (extern int ASRCload(...) etc.). digiTS signatures are TS class members; no prototype headers. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

ASRCfindBr — for a current-controlled form, locate/create the controlling source's branch equation (CKTmkCur). Counterpart is the controlling-branch resolution in BSourceAnalogElement.setup() (ctx.makeCur / branch lookup), matching the controlled-source-base.ts/CCVS branch-allocation pattern. Absorbed into the recon; blocked PENDING.

SPICEdev ASRCinfo dispatch struct (C99 designated initializers). digiTS registration is a component Definition + registry.register(...); which-methods-exist is captured by which methods the element implements. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) / §4 glue note.
extern decls for ASRCpTable[]/ASRCnames[]/size ints. C prototype header; param tables are TS data structures in digiTS. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).
DEV_ASRC itf accessor header. C dispatch glue; digiTS registration is an ES-module import + registry.register. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) / §4 glue note.

ASRCload — the core DC/transient companion load: evaluate the parse tree (IFeval-equivalent → rhs + derivatives), stamp the linearized VCVS/VCCS/CCVS/CCCS Jacobian columns + RHS, store ASRCacValues for small-signal, set ASRCprev_value. Counterpart is BSourceAnalogElement.load() built on src/solver/analog/expression.ts (evaluate + differentiate). v41 adds the m/reciprocm factor + CKTsrcFact MODETRANOP ramp + TREALLOC scratch + ASRCvars[] indexing — blocked PENDING hunks h001/h002/h003.

ASRCmDelete — C heap free of a model and its instance list; the file is DELETED in v41 (Makefile.am drops it, DEVmodDelete set NULL). JS is GC'd; no model-teardown counterpart. PLANNING.md §4 (<dev>mdel.c) / §5 case (a). The deletion itself is faithfully a no-op for digiTS.

ASRCparam — instance parameter setter (v/i parse-tree, tc1/tc2/reciproctc + v41-new m/reciprocm + temp/dtemp). Counterpart is BSourceAnalogElement.setParam()/constructor param resolution (hot-loadable). v41 adds ASRC_M/ASRC_RM and the ASRC_TEMP/ASRC_DTEMP cases — blocked PENDING hunks h001/h002.

ASRCpzLoad — pole-zero analysis load (SPcomplex *s frequency). Pole-zero NOT implemented in digiTS (analysis-scope.md: no PZ AnalogEngine method, no PZ engine file, no PZ MCP tool). PLANNING.md §5 case (b). The file is wholly owned by PZ — it stamps derivatives/factor into the matrix only for the PZ pass; no shared helper for DC/tran/AC.

ASRCsetup + ASRCunsetup — branch-equation allocation for V-form, ASRCposPtr matrix-cell TSTALLOC over the controlling vars (VCVS/VCCS/CCVS/CCCS topologies), shorted-ASRC error, default tc/m fill, ASRCvars[] population. Counterpart is BSourceAnalogElement.setup() (ctx.makeCur + solver.allocElement in the same order, Sparse-Solver-Settled). v41 adds m/reciprocm defaults, the ASRCvars[] cache, the up-front numVars sizing, and the restructured TSTALLOC walk — blocked PENDING hunks h001/h002. ASRCunsetup node teardown has no digiTS counterpart (engine rebuilt per compile).

ASRCtemp — instance temperature default processing (ASRCtemp = CKTtemp unless given; dtemp handling). Counterpart is BSourceAnalogElement.computeTemperature(). Absorbed into the recon; blocked PENDING.
Autotools source list. digiTS registers components via src/core/registry.ts; no autotools build. PLANNING.md 5 case (a). Both hunks drop the deleted C-heap files bjtdest.c / bjtmdel.c.

IFparm BJTmPTable model param-name table. Counterpart is BJT_SPICE_L1_PARAM_DEFS (defineModelParams). Per-hunk: the BJT_COMPAT comment block is C-comment plumbing; the new v41 model-param rows (ibe/ibc, rco/vo/gamma/qco, tiss1/2, quasimod/vg/cn/d, ic/ib/pd/te_max/rth0) and alias-flag rows PORT onto the param defs.

AC small-signal load (BJTacLoad). AC is implemented engine-wide (analysis-scope.md: ac-analysis.ts, defaultStampAcHandler, optional AnalogElement.stampAc hook). BjtL1Element has NO stampAc method yet -> all three hunks blocked by reconstruction bjt#recon/stampAc; the v41 collCX AC stamps ride on top as ordinary deltas.

BJTask - instance/operating-point IFparm value getter. digiTS has no IFparm ask API. Every case is a getter with no digiTS counterpart; the v41 * BJTtype polarity factor and the new COLLCXNODE case live only inside this absent API. All hunks NO-COUNTERPART.

BJTconvTest - per-NR convergence test. digiTS folds the cchat/cbhat convergence prediction inline into BjtL1Element.load (bjtload.c:331-337 cite at bjt.ts). The v41 delta adds the vbcx/delvbcx prediction for the internal-collector-resistance node. PORT.

Instance/model structs + state-vector macros + ID enums. Counterparts: BJT_L1_SCHEMA (state slots), BJT_SPICE_L1_PARAM_DEFS + the params bag. Per-hunk: GENinstance/GENmodel embedding, const node-id qualifiers, define->enum reformat and the noise-source-index enum are C mechanics; the new state slots (vbcx/vrci/qbcx/irci_*), the BEtSatCur/BCtSatCur split, tf2/3/6/7, the collCX node + matrix pointers and new model fields are v41-additive structure that maps onto the schema/param defs.
C-heap free. v41 reduces BJTdelete to FREE(inst->BJTsens) (sensitivity scratch). digiTS is GC-managed and has no sensitivity (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (a).
Whole-file deletion of BJTdestroy - a C-heap free loop releasing every model/instance. digiTS is GC-managed. File deleted in v41. PLANNING.md 5 case (a).
BJTdisto - distortion (Volterra-kernel) analysis load. Distortion is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).

BJTdSetup - distortion-analysis setup (computes Volterra EqualDeriv terms). Distortion is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b). The area-removal here mirrors the DC change but lives entirely inside the distortion setup.

C extern-prototype header. Hunks remove the BJTdestroy/BJTmDelete prototypes (deleted heap funcs), change BJTdelete signature, drop a register qualifier. digiTS has no prototype headers. PLANNING.md 5 case (a).

BJTgetic - DEVsetic initial-condition seeding. digiTS seeds IC inside BjtL1Element.load under MODEUIC from ICVBE/ICVCE (bjt.ts:1442-1456). The single hunk is purely the linked-list-walk accessor rename; the IC body is unchanged v26->v41 and has no separate digiTS getic method. NO-COUNTERPART.

SPICEdev BJTinfo dispatch struct -> C99 designated initializers. digiTS registers via the component registry; method binding is the class. All non-NULL func-ptr assignments preserved; only DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set NULL (deleted heap funcs). No new param slot / default / capability. PLANNING.md 5 case (a) / 4 glue note.

Transient/DC companion load (BJTload). Counterpart is BjtL1Element.load (createSpiceL1BjtElement). v41 deltas: area-scaling relocation, separate ibe/ibc leakage, substrate-current BJTsubSatCurGiven gating, ttype=type*subs, and the new Kull quasi-saturation / internal-collector-resistance block (vrci/vbcx/Irci/Qbci + collCX stamps). All PENDING onto the existing v26 Gummel-Poon load.
BJTmAsk - model-param IFparm value getter. digiTS has no model-param ask API. Every hunk is a getter case with no digiTS counterpart. All NO-COUNTERPART.
Whole-file deletion of BJTmDelete - a C-heap free unlinking a model. GC language; no model destructor/linked list. File deleted in v41. PLANNING.md 5 case (a).

BJTmParam - model-param setter. Counterpart is the params bag populated via props.getModelParam (+ setParam). The new v41 cases PORT as new param wiring; the removed C2/C4 cases are the alias collapse. All PENDING.
BJTnoise - noise analysis. Noise is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).

BJTparam - instance-param setter. Counterpart is BjtL1Element.setParam / the instance params. Both hunks are cosmetic (switch whitespace, FALLTHROUGH comments); logic byte-identical. All NO-COUNTERPART.
BJTpzLoad - pole-zero load (SPcomplex *s stamps). Pole-zero is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b). Includes the v41 collCX PZ stamps, all inside the PZ-only body.
BJTsAcLoad - sensitivity AC load. Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md: no SENstruct/senParmNo in src/). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).

Matrix-pointer alloc + model default-value processing + state sizing (BJTsetup). Counterpart is BjtL1Element.setup. v41 deltas: BEsatCur/BCsatCur defaults, the active c2/c4>1e-4 IS-scaling, intCollResist/epi/quasimod/tiss/SOA defaults, the new collCX-node allocation (CKTmkVolt) and the collCX TSTALLOC block. BJTunsetup has no digiTS counterpart (GC) - handled per-hunk.
BJTsLoad - sensitivity load. Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).
BJTsoaCheck - safe-operating-area check. SOA is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md: no soaCheck method, no CKTsoaMaxWarns analogue). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).
BJTsPrint - sensitivity debug printout. Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b). Pure stdout.
BJTsSetup - sensitivity setup (assigns BJTsenParmNo into info->SENparms). Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).
BJTsUpdate - sensitivity update. Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md 5 case (b).

Temperature / default-value processing (BJTtemp). Counterpart is BjtL1Element.computeTemperature + computeBjtTempParams. v41 deltas: separate BEtSatCur/BCtSatCur, area-folding relocated into temp, f2/f3/f6/f7 lifted to per-instance temperature-dependent, mje/mjc/mjs 0.999 clamps, separate nominal-temp band-gap (pbfact1/egfet1/vtnom), intCollResist quasimod temperature adjust. All PENDING.
BJTtrunc - LTE/timestep contribution. Counterpart is BjtL1Element.getLteTimestep (cktTerr over qbe/qbc/qsub). v41 adds the qbcx term under intCollResistGiven. PORT.

Automake source-list fragment. C build system: digiTS has no autotools build; components register via src/core/registry.ts. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5. Both hunks only delete capdel.c/capdest.c/capmdel.c entries from libcap_la_SOURCES.

IFparm CAPpTable/CAPmPTable parameter-name tables. digiTS keys params by name string (defineModelParams in capacitor.ts), no integer-id IFparm table. Both hunks are IFparm alias-flag edits (IOPAP/IOPR to redirect-flavoured macros); resolved per hunk (both NO-COUNTERPART). Q1 is resolved: the geometric-capacitance model IS ported (reconstruction item cap#recon/computeTemperature adds cj/cjsw/defw/defl/narrow/short/mCap). Even with those params present, both hunks stay NO-COUNTERPART — the v41 change is purely an IF_REDIRECT parser-flag edit, a mechanism digiTS has no counterpart for (name-keyed params, no integer-id IFparm table, no generic ask/set redirect).

AC small-signal load (CAPacLoad). AC is implemented engine-wide (analysis-scope.md: ac-analysis.ts, defaultStampAcHandler, optional AnalogElement.stampAc hook). The single hunk is the model/instance linked-list-walk accessor rename plus the four CAPpos/neg matrix-pointer field renames — see Q2 on the absent stampAc method.

Instance/model structs + param-id constants. CAPACITOR_SCHEMA / AnalogCapacitorElement instance fields are the digiTS counterpart. Mixes a portable named state-count macro (CAPnumStates) with C generic-struct embedding and sensitivity macros; h003 split into a (portable) / b (no-counterpart).

C-heap free (FREE(here)) unlinking one instance from a linked list. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no allocator, no destructor, no model-instance linked list. File is deleted in v41.
C-heap free loop releasing every model and instance. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no explicit destructor. File is deleted in v41.

C extern-prototype header. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS has no prototype headers — signatures are TypeScript class members. The single hunk only removes the extern decls of the three deleted C-heap functions (CAPdelete/CAPdestroy/CAPmDelete); no surviving declaration changes.
Initial-condition retrieval (CAPgetic). digiTS implements DC-OP and transient (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk is the model/instance linked-list-walk accessor rename inside the IC-retrieval loop.

SPICEdev CAPinfo registration dispatch struct. digiTS registration is the CapacitorDefinition object; method binding is the AnalogCapacitorElement class. Reviewed per the PLANNING.md §4 registration-glue note — single hunk.
Transient/DC companion-model load (CAPload). digiTS implements DC-OP and transient (analysis-scope.md). Maps to AnalogCapacitorElement.load, which already cites capload.c throughout.
C-heap free that unlinks a model and frees its instances. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no model destructor, no model linked list. File is deleted in v41.

Instance parameter application (CAPparam). Maps to AnalogCapacitorElement.setParam / constructor. Hunk mixes a C cp_getvar signature change (no digiTS analogue) with a behavioral CAPcapacinst store; h001 split into a (no-counterpart) / b (portable).

Pole-zero load (CAPpzLoad). Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md ratifies PZ as not implemented in digiTS (no PZ method on the AnalogEngine interface, no PZ engine file under src/solver/analog/, no PZ MCP tool).

Sensitivity AC-load (CAPsAcLoad). Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md ratifies sensitivity as not implemented in digiTS (no SENstruct/SENparms type anywhere in src/, no senParmNo field, no sensitivity engine method/tool).

Matrix-pointer alloc + state sizing (CAPsetup). Maps to AnalogCapacitorElement.setup. One hunk mixes the portable *states += CAPnumStates change with a CKTsenInfo sensitivity-only allocation branch; h003 split into a (portable) / b (no-counterpart).
Sensitivity load (CAPsLoad). Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md ratifies sensitivity as not implemented in digiTS.

Safe-operating-area check (CAPsoaCheck). Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md ratifies SOA as not implemented in digiTS (no soaCheck method on AnalogElement, no CKTsoaMaxWarns analogue, no SOA engine pass, no SOA MCP tool).
Sensitivity debug printout (CAPsPrint). Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md ratifies sensitivity as not implemented in digiTS.
Sensitivity setup (CAPsSetup). Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md ratifies sensitivity as not implemented in digiTS.
Sensitivity update (CAPsUpdate). Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md ratifies sensitivity as not implemented in digiTS.

Temperature / default-value processing (CAPtemp). digiTS implements DC-OP/transient/AC (analysis-scope.md); the TC/SCALE fold has a counterpart in the AnalogCapacitorElement constructor / setParam. h003 is a genuine new v41 behavioral branch (CAPcapac reset to CAPcapacinst) — see Q3.
LTE / timestep-truncation contribution (CAPtrunc). digiTS implements transient with LTE/timestep infra (analysis-scope.md); maps to AnalogCapacitorElement.getLteTimestep (delegates to cktTerr).

Autotools libcccs_la_SOURCES list. digiTS registers via src/core/registry.ts; no autotools build. Single hunk drops the three deleted C-heap files (cccsdel.c/cccsdest.c/cccsmdel.c), all themselves NO-COUNTERPART. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

CCCSask is a SPICE IFparm value getter (switch on integer `which` selector). digiTS has no IFparm ask API; programmatic reads go through facade/MCP, not a per-device getter. The single hunk adds `return(OK)` after the CCCS_M case (a C fall-through bug fix in the getter). No digiTS analogue. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

Instance/model structs + device-parameter id table. CCCSAnalogElement instance fields (pinNodes out+/out-, _contBranch, _hPCtBr/_hNCtBr) are the behavioral counterpart; the GENinstance/GENmodel embedding and the IFparm id enum have no counterpart. Three hunks resolved individually: h001/h002 PENDING (node/branch fields + ptr->Ptr handle renames), h003 NO-COUNTERPART (param-id + sensitivity-question id reformat).

Whole-file deletion of a C-heap free (CCCSdelete: FREE(here)) unlinking one CCCSinstance from a linked list. digiTS is GC-managed; no allocator, no destructor, no linked list. File deleted in v41. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).
Whole-file deletion of a C-heap free loop (CCCSdestroy) releasing every CCCSmodel and CCCSinstance. digiTS is GC-managed; no explicit destructor. File deleted in v41. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

C extern-prototype header. The single hunk only removes the extern decls of CCCSdelete/CCCSdestroy/CCCSmDelete (the three deleted C-heap functions). digiTS has no prototype headers- signatures are TS class members. No surviving declaration changes. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

SPICEdev CCCSinfo dispatch struct, converted to C99 designated initialisers. digiTS has no SPICEdev table- registration is CCCSDefinition, method binding is the class. Examined per the §4 glue note: every non-NULL function-pointer assignment is preserved across v26->v41; the only non-cosmetic changes are DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete/DEVdelete set to NULL (the deleted heap functions). No new parameter slot, no changed default, no new device capability. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) + §4 registration-glue note.

Transient/DC companion load. Maps to CCCSAnalogElement.stampOutput (cccs.ts:193-211) invoked from load() (cccs.ts:236-242). The body `*(CCCSposContBrPtr) += CCCScoeff; *(CCCSnegContBrPtr) -= CCCScoeff;` is the linear gm/-gm stamp into G[posNode,contBranch]/G[negNode,contBranch]. Single hunk h001 is accessor-macro + ptr->Ptr renames. The stamped CCCScoeff is the m-folded coefficient (cccspar.c:26-27 `CCCScoeff *= CCCSmValue`); digiTS lacks the M multiplier, so h001 is blocked by cccs#recon/multiplier.

Whole-file deletion of a C-heap free (CCCSmDelete) unlinking a CCCSmodel and freeing its instances. digiTS is GC-managed; no model destructor, no model linked list. File deleted in v41. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

Pole-zero load (CCCSpzLoad, signature takes SPcomplex *s). Pole-zero analysis is not implemented in digiTS (analysis-scope.md: no PZ method on AnalogEngine, no PZ engine file, no PZ MCP tool). Whole file belongs to PZ. PLANNING.md §5 case (b).

Sensitivity AC-load (CCCSsAcLoad; body gated on `here->CCCSsenParmNo`). Sensitivity analysis is not implemented in digiTS (analysis-scope.md: no SENstruct/SENparms type, no senParmNo field, no sensitivity engine/tool). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).

Matrix-pointer alloc + controlling-branch resolution. Maps to CCCSAnalogElement.setup (cccs.ts:140-162). h001 = the model/instance loop + `CCCScontBranch = CKTfndBranch(...)` resolve (digiTS ctx.findBranch, cccs.ts:151) and the zero-branch error check (cccs.ts:152-156); h002 = the two TSTALLOC ptr->Ptr renames (digiTS solver.allocElement, cccs.ts:160-161). Both PENDING.
Sensitivity load (CCCSsLoad; body gated on `here->CCCSsenParmNo`, reads CKTrhsOld for sensitivity). Sensitivity not implemented in digiTS (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).
Sensitivity debug printout (CCCSsPrint; pure printf to stdout, ends in CCCSsenParmNo dump). Sensitivity not implemented in digiTS; also pure stdout with no digiTS analogue. PLANNING.md §5 case (b).
Sensitivity setup (CCCSsSetup; assigns `here->CCCSsenParmNo = ++(info->SENparms)` into a SENstruct). Sensitivity not implemented in digiTS- no SENstruct (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).

Autotools source list. digiTS registers via src/core/registry.ts; no build-system file. Single hunk only drops the deleted C-heap files ccvsdel.c/ccvsdest.c/ccvsmdel.c (all themselves NO-COUNTERPART). PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

Instance/model structs + device-param/sensitivity-question id constants. CCVSAnalogElement fields are the counterpart (branchIndex, _contBranch, _hPIbr.._hIbrCtBr, transresistance model param). Resolved per hunk: h001/h002 (instance struct flatten + const node qualifiers + matrix-pointer ptr->Ptr renames) PENDING (live field counterparts); h003 (model struct GENmodel flatten + #define->enum reformat of device-param IDs and sensitivity-question IDs) NO-COUNTERPART (C struct/enum glue, no digiTS field landing).

Whole-file deletion of CCVSdelete, a C-heap free (FREE(here)) unlinking one CCVSinstance from a linked list. digiTS is GC-managed; no allocator, no destructor, no linked list. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).
Whole-file deletion of CCVSdestroy, a C-heap free loop releasing every CCVSmodel and CCVSinstance. digiTS is GC-managed; no explicit destructor. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

C extern-prototype header. The single hunk only removes the extern decls of the deleted CCVSdelete/CCVSdestroy/CCVSmDelete heap functions. digiTS has no prototype headers; signatures are TS class members. No surviving declaration changes. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

CCVSfindBr (lazy branch-equation allocation for a CCVS used as a controlling source) maps to ControlledSourceElement.findBranchFor (controlled-source-base.ts:136-141), reached via ctx.findBranch. Single hunk is accessor-macro renames (model->CCVSnextModel -> CCVSnextModel(model), etc.) in the model/instance walk.

SPICEdev dispatch struct converted to C99 designated initializers. digiTS has no SPICEdev table; registration is CCVSDefinition (ccvs.ts:356-398), method binding is the class. Every non-NULL function-pointer assignment is preserved across v26->v41; the only non-cosmetic change is DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete/DEVdelete set NULL (the deleted heap functions). No new parameter slot, changed default, or new capability. PLANNING.md §4 glue note + §5 case (a).

CCVSload (transient/DC companion stamp) maps to CCVSAnalogElement._stampLinear (the +-1 B/C incidence, ccvs.ts:178-185) + stampOutput (the -coeff control-branch coupling, ccvs.ts:204-217), dispatched from load (ccvs.ts:235-241). Single hunk is accessor-macro + ptr->Ptr field renames; the five stamp lines are unchanged in value.
Whole-file deletion of CCVSmDelete, a C-heap free unlinking one CCVSmodel and freeing its instances. digiTS is GC-managed; no model destructor, no model linked list. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

Pole-zero load (CCVSpzLoad, SPcomplex *s). PZ not implemented per analysis-scope.md: no PZ method on AnalogEngine, no PZ engine file, no PZ MCP tool. Whole file belongs to PZ. PLANNING.md §5 case (b).

Sensitivity AC-load (CCVSsAcLoad). Whole body gated on here->CCVSsenParmNo and writes ckt->CKTsenInfo->SEN_RHS/SEN_iRHS. Sensitivity not implemented per analysis-scope.md: no SENstruct/SENparms type in src/, no senParmNo field, no sensitivity engine/tool. Despite the AcLoad name it is wholly sensitivity-owned, no shared helper for the AC analysis we implement. PLANNING.md §5 case (b).

CCVSsetup maps to CCVSAnalogElement.setup (ccvs.ts:139-170): branch makeCur (ccvsset.c:40-43), controlling-branch resolve (ccvsset.c:45) and the shorted-CCVS / unknown-control fatal checks, then the five TSTALLOC allocElement calls (ccvsset.c:58-62 -> ccvs.ts:165-169). h001/h002 PORT. h003 = CCVSunsetup (CKTdltNNum frees the branch equation number) NO-COUNTERPART; digiTS has no per-element unsetup teardown (fresh engine per compile(), default-facade.ts:115-129), #28 ratified.
Sensitivity load (CCVSsLoad). Whole body gated on here->CCVSsenParmNo. Sensitivity not implemented per analysis-scope.md. PLANNING.md §5 case (b).
Sensitivity debug printout (CCVSsPrint). Pure stdout printf of CCVS sensitivity bookkeeping; sensitivity not implemented per analysis-scope.md. PLANNING.md §5 case (b).
Sensitivity setup (CCVSsSetup). Assigns CCVSsenParmNo into a SENstruct (info->SENparms). Sensitivity not implemented per analysis-scope.md. PLANNING.md §5 case (b).

Autotools build manifest. C-artifact per PLANNING.md §4 (Makefile.am -> none). The hunk only removes cswdel.c/cswdest.c/cswmdel.c from the source list (the C heap-free files deleted in v41). digiTS has no build manifest analogue.

IFparm instance/model param tables (CSWpTable, CSWmPTable), CSWnames terminal names, and the NUMELEMS/sizeof size globals. Mutual-inductor instance parameter application (MUTparam). Maps to MutualInductorElement.setParam (mutual-inductor.ts:168-173). Two hunks: h001 removes a `#ifdef MUTUAL` preprocessor guard (C-only); h002 removes a `#endif /* MUTUAL */` (C-only). Body is byte-identical v26→v41 — purely preprocessor-guard removal.

Mutual-inductor pole-zero load (MUTpzLoad). Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md ratifies PZ as not implemented in digiTS — no PZ method on the AnalogEngine interface, no PZ engine file, no PZ MCP tool. The whole file belongs to PZ analysis; two hunks (h001 removes #ifdef MUTUAL; h002 is the linked-list-walk accessor rename + MUTbr1br2/MUTbr2br1 → Ptr rename + #endif removal inside MUTpzLoad).

Mutual-inductor setup (MUTsetup). digiTS implements MUT setup via MutualInductorElement.setup (mutual-inductor.ts:74-115). Two hunks: h001 is a top-of-file comment-formatting change (whitespace only). h002 is the structural rewrite — TSTALLOC macro lifted out of the per-instance body, `#ifdef MUTUAL` removed, accessor renames, MUTbr1br2/MUTbr2br1 → Ptr renames, AND the ERR_WARNING for missing partner upgraded to ERR_FATAL with `return(E_NOTFOUND)` instead of continuing. digiTS already throws on missing partner (mutual-inductor.ts:81-91/86-91) — same error semantics — but per PLANNING.md §6 whether `throw new Error(…)` is the structural counterpart of `IFerrorf(ERR_FATAL); return(E_NOTFOUND)` is open question Q-MUT-FATAL.

Sensitivity debug printout for mutual inductors (MUTsPrint). Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md ratifies sensitivity as not implemented in digiTS; also the function is pure stdout printing with no digiTS analogue. The file's own header explicitly says `This function is obsolete (was used by an old sensitivity analysis)`. Three hunks: h001 removes `#ifdef MUTUAL`, h002 is the linked-list-walk accessor rename inside the sensitivity print, h003 removes `#endif /*MUTUAL*/`.

Mutual-inductor sensitivity setup (MUTsSetup). Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md ratifies sensitivity as not implemented in digiTS — the function assigns MUTsenParmNo into a SENstruct (info->SENparms) that has no digiTS analogue. The file's own header explicitly says `This function is obsolete (was used by an old sensitivity analysis)`. Three hunks: h001 removes `#ifdef MUTUAL`, h002 is the linked-list-walk accessor rename inside MUTsSetup, h003 removes `#endif /* MUTUAL */`.

Mutual-inductor temperature pass (MUTtemp). digiTS implements computeTemperature on MutualInductorElement (mutual-inductor.ts:140-144) but only the baseline MUTfactor = k·sqrt(L1·L2) computation. Two hunks: h001 removes a comment header block (cosmetic). h002 is a massive rewrite that adds (1) `fabs(ind1*ind2)` instead of `ind1*ind2` inside the sqrt — a genuine behavioral change for negative inductance handling; (2) the entire CKTindverbosity-gated INDsystem bookkeeping and Cholesky positive-definite verification of inductive systems — a debugging/diagnostic capability digiTS lacks (`CKTindverbosity` has no digiTS analogue, no CKTindverbosity field on TempContext/LoadContext, no diagnostic INDsystem traversal/Cholesky pass anywhere in src/). The Cholesky verification is gated entirely on `ckt->CKTindverbosity > 0` — opt-in user diagnostic. Q-MUT-VERIFY: whether digiTS should grow CKTindverbosity + Cholesky verification, port the fabs() change only, or accept both as architectural.

Automake libisrc_la_SOURCES fragment. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS has no autotools build; components register via src/core/registry.ts. The single hunk only drops the deleted isrcdest.c and isrcmdel.c entries from the source list - both themselves NO-COUNTERPART.

IFparm ISRCpTable[] parameter-name/id table. digiTS keys params by name string (defineModelParams in dc-current-source.ts and ac-current-source.ts) and exposes no integer-id IFparm table. h001 is the author-line comment header (NO-COUNTERPART). h002/h003 reshuffle the parameter table: add the `c`/`current` readout aliases, move `sine` from a plain IOP to an IOPR redirect of `sin`, and change `external` from IF_REALVEC to IF_STRING. No IFparm registration API exists in digiTS, so the table-row plumbing has no counterpart; the `current` instance readout it advertises is realized structurally by AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.getPinCurrents (no separate ISRCcurrent member/ask path).

ISRCaccept - transient breakpoint scheduling for the coeff-array PULSE waveform. digiTS implements transient (analysis-scope.md); the breakpoint-scheduling counterpart is AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep / nextBreakpoint. h001 is the author-line comment (NO-COUNTERPART). h002-h005 are the ISRCnextModel/ISRCinstances accessor-macro renames plus the v41 PULSE-PHASE compatibility rework (newcompat.xs branch and the `else if (PHASE>0) tmax = PHASE*PER` pulse-count gating) inside the coeff-array PULSE breakpoint logic. digiTS schedules breakpoints for its own square/triangle/sawtooth/noise set, NOT for the ngspice ISRCcoeffs[]/ISRCfunctionOrder PULSE engine - that engine is the absent v26 baseline, so the PULSE-breakpoint hunks are blocked by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms.

ISRCacLoad - AC small-signal RHS stamp. AC is implemented engine-wide (analysis-scope.md: ac-analysis.ts, defaultStampAcHandler, optional AnalogElement.stampAc hook). AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.stampAc already exists (ac-current-source.ts:399-427) and stamps m·acReal/m·acImag at ±pos/±neg with m≡1. The single hunk h001 adds (1) the accessor-macro renames, (2) the `m = here->ISRCmValue` multiplier applied at each stamp - absent in digiTS (no `m` param), blocked by isrc#recon/parallelMultiplier, and (3) the MODEACNOISE / noise_input branch that injects a unit excitation for the AC-noise driving source - this is part of noise analysis (OUT per analysis-scope.md) and is split out as NO-COUNTERPART.

ISRCask - SPICE IFparm value getter (returns ISRCcurrent for ISRC_CURRENT, no-op for ISRC_EXTERNAL). Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS has no IFparm ask API - parameter readout is via class accessors / getPinCurrents, not an integer-keyed ask switch. The single hunk only reshapes the XSPICE/SHARED_MODULE preprocessor guards around the ISRC_CURRENT and ISRC_EXTERNAL cases; no surviving digiTS-visible behavior.

Instance/model structs + source-function-type macros + parameter-id constants. The digiTS counterpart is the AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl / DcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl instance fields plus the param defs. h001 is the author-line comment (NO-COUNTERPART). h002 embeds `struct GENinstance gen` and lifts ISRCmodPtr/ISRCnextInstance/ISRCname/ISRCstate to GEN-macro accessors, qualifies node ids `const`, and unguards the ISRCcurrent member - C struct mechanics + the ISRCcurrent readout field (realized via getPinCurrents in digiTS). h003 embeds `struct GENmodel gen` and converts the source-type #defines (PULSE..EXTERNAL) and the device-parameter #defines (ISRC_DC..ISRC_EXTERNAL) to enums - byte-identical numeric values, C-preprocessor reformat. No StatePool slot in digiTS isrc (the source stamps RHS-only, no state); the only behavioral field is ISRCcurrent.

ISRCdelete - C-heap free. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no allocator, no destructor, no model-instance linked list. The v41 hunk rewrites the linked-list-unlink delete into a per-instance FREE of ISRCcoeffs/trnoise/trrandom state - all heap bookkeeping with no digiTS counterpart.
ISRCdestroy - C-heap free loop releasing every ISRCmodel and ISRCinstance. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no explicit destructor. Whole file deleted in v41.

C extern-prototype header. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS has no prototype headers - signatures are TypeScript class members. The single hunk only rewrites the ISRCdelete prototype and removes the ISRCdestroy/ISRCmDelete prototypes (the deleted C-heap functions); no surviving declaration has a digiTS analogue.

SPICEdev ISRCinfo registration dispatch struct, converted to C99 designated initialisers. digiTS registration is the DcCurrentSourceDefinition / AcCurrentSourceDefinition objects; method binding is the element classes. Reviewed per the PLANNING.md §4 registration-glue note - the single hunk h001 reformats the whole struct. Every function-pointer slot that is non-NULL in v26 stays non-NULL in v41; the only non-cosmetic changes are DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set to NULL (the deleted heap functions) and the addition of explicit .DEVinstSize/.DEVmodSize designators - no new parameter slot, no changed default, no new device capability.

ISRCload - transient/DC RHS stamp + the coeff-array waveform evaluation engine (PULSE/SINE/EXP/SFFM/AM/PWL/TRNOISE/TRRANDOM driven by ISRCcoeffs[]/ISRCfunctionOrder). digiTS implements DC-OP and transient (analysis-scope.md); the RHS-only stamp maps to AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load / DcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load. h001 is the compatmode include (NO-COUNTERPART). h002 is the accessor-macro rename of the model/instance walk. h003-h013 are the per-waveform evaluation bodies (PULSE phase rework, SINE/SFFM/AM phase unification, PWL paren cleanup) - these target the ngspice coeff-array waveform engine, which digiTS does NOT implement (its waveforms are its own sine/square/triangle/sawtooth/expression/sweep/am/fm/noise set, not ISRCcoeffs-driven); blocked by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms. h014 is the TRNOISE timezero-reset rework, blocked by the same reconstruction. h015 records `here->ISRCcurrent = m*value` - the m multiplier (blocked by isrc#recon/parallelMultiplier) folded with the ISRCcurrent readout.

ISRCmDelete - C-heap free unlinking an ISRCmodel and freeing its instances. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no model destructor, no model linked list. Whole file deleted in v41.

ISRCparam - instance parameter application (the IFparm setter). digiTS applies params via the constructor + setParam reading the property bag, not an integer-keyed setter switch. h001 is a `switch(param)` whitespace-only edit (NO-COUNTERPART). h002 adds /* FALLTHROUGH */ comments to the ISRC_AC vector-parse cases - the AC mag/phase parse (acMag/acPhase + given-flags) is a real behavioral counterpart of ac-current-source.ts acMagnitude/acPhase. h003/h004 add `trnoise_state_free`/`tfree` of the prior state before re-init on an `alter` - this is part of the coeff-array TRNOISE/TRRANDOM waveform engine that digiTS does not implement (blocked by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms).

ISRCtemp - per-instance temperature/default-value processing pass. Maps to AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl constructor/setParam (the acMag=1 / acPhase=0 defaulting on a bare AC token is already implemented at ac-current-source.ts:309-312). h001 is the accessor-macro rename of the model/instance walk. h002 reworks the no-value diagnostics: the bare `no value, DC 0 assumed` ERR_WARNING->ERR_INFO downgrade maps onto digiTS default-current handling, but the new `dc value used for op instead of transient time=0 value` warning compares the DC value against the transient time-0 value drawn from ISRCcoeffs[] (the coeff-array waveform engine) - that comparison path depends on the absent coeff engine, so h002 is blocked by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms.

Per device-class-scope.md mos1 is IN = complete v41 device, so the dedicated MOS1acLoad stamp belongs in digiTS. The missing stampAc is a v26-baseline gap → reconstruction item mos1#recon/stampAc; the single hunk h001 is PENDING and blocked by it (applies as the accessor-macro rename once the reconstruction is APPLIED). Mirrors cap#recon/stampAc.

MOS1ask = the generic DEVask parameter-query dispatcher (switch on integer param id). digiTS has no SPICEdev dispatch table and no MOS1ask-equivalent generic query function — parameters are queried by name through the PropertyBag. All three hunks are pure C struct-accessor-macro renames (here->sMOS1modPtr->X → MOS1modPtr(here)->X) inside this query-only function; no parameter, default, or computation changes. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

MOS1convTest = per-device convergence check. digiTS implements the equivalent noncon test inline in load() (icheckLimited + CKTnoncon gating, mosfet.ts:1661-1714 isConverged/cdhat/cbhat). The single hunk is the model/instance-loop accessor-macro rename only.

Instance/model struct + id #define→enum header. MOSFET_SCHEMA (17 slots) + the private DC-op scalar fields are the state counterpart; params are name-keyed. Mixes a portable MOS1numStates=17 state-count macro with noise-source enum (noise NO-IMPL), GENinstance/GENmodel C struct-embedding macros, sensitivity-state macros, and the device/model/question integer-id enums (byte-identical values; digiTS keys by name). Resolved hunk-by-hunk.

MOS1delete = C-heap free, rewritten in v41 to free the per-instance MOS1sens block via the new GENinstance-based signature. digiTS is GC-managed; no allocator, no destructor, no linked-list unlink, no MOS1sens block (sensitivity not implemented). PLANNING.md §5 case (a).
MOS1destroy = whole-file deletion of a C-heap free loop releasing every model and instance. digiTS is GC-managed; no explicit destructor. File deleted in v41. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).
MOS1disto = distortion analysis load. Distortion is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md: no distortion engine method/file/MCP tool). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).
MOS1dSetup = distortion setup. Distortion is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).

C extern-prototype header. digiTS has no prototype headers — signatures are TS class members. The hunk only changes the MOS1delete signature and removes the MOS1destroy/MOS1mDelete decls (the deleted heap functions). PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

MOS1getic = initial-condition retrieval (DEVsetic). DC-OP/transient are implemented (analysis-scope.md). digiTS handles ICs via the ICVDS/ICVGS/ICVBS instance params (emitGroup 'IC') read in load() (mosfet.ts:1189-1209 MODEUIC path). The single hunk is the model/instance-loop accessor-macro rename only.

SPICEdev MOS1info dispatch struct converted to C99 designated initialisers. digiTS has no SPICEdev table — registration is via register-all.ts / the element factory, method binding is the class. Reviewed per the §4 glue note: the only non-cosmetic changes are DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set to NULL (the deleted heap functions) and DEVdelete pointed at the new MOS1delete signature; every other DEV* binding is unchanged. No new parameter slot, no changed default, no new capability.

MOS1load = the companion/DC load. Maps to MosfetAnalogElement.load() (mosfet.ts:964-1715), ported line-for-line from mos1load.c (cited throughout the file). All 33 hunks are accessor-macro renames (MOS1nextModel/MOS1instances), whitespace/comment reflow, the 'end of function' comment, and two C-scope localisations (const double arg / double sarg moved inside the bd/bs depletion-cap blocks) — no algorithm, operand-order, or stamp change. Sensitivity-gated lines (senflag/SenCond/CKTsenInfo) appear only as unchanged context within these hunks; digiTS's load() implements the non-sensitivity path and the v41 deltas land as cosmetic reflow.

MOS1mDelete = whole-file deletion of a C-heap free unlinking a model and freeing its instances. digiTS is GC-managed; no model destructor, no model linked list. File deleted in v41. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

MOS1noise = noise analysis load (N_DENS/INT_NOIZ plot registration + thermal/flicker noise). Noise is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md: no noise method on AnalogElement, no noise engine file, no noise MCP tool). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).

MOS1param = instance parameter application (DEVparam). digiTS counterpart is setParam() + the emitGroup 'IC' machinery + spiceConverter (kelvinToCelsius) on TEMP. Both hunks are C-only changes resolved per hunk: a cp_getvar 4th-arg signature change (no digiTS analogue) and GCC -Wimplicit-fallthrough comment annotations on the MOS1_IC switch.
MOS1pzLoad = pole-zero load. PZ is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md: no PZ method on AnalogEngine, no PZ engine file, no PZ MCP tool). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).
MOS1sAcLoad = sensitivity AC-load. Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md: no SENstruct/SENparms type in src/, no senParmNo field, no sensitivity engine/tool). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).

MOS1setup + MOS1unsetup. MOS1setup maps to MosfetAnalogElement.setup() (mosfet.ts:890-952: ctx.allocStates(17), makeVolt prime nodes, the 22-call TSTALLOC sequence). h001/h002 are model/instance-loop accessor renames + a sensitivity-state-sizing constant change (10 → MOS1numSenStates, sensitivity-only). MOS1unsetup (h003) is C node-table bookkeeping (CKTdltNNum) with no clear digiTS counterpart — raised as open question Q3. h002 mixes a portable accessor rename with a sensitivity-only line → proposed split (see review §5).
MOS1sLoad = sensitivity load. Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).
MOS1sPrint = sensitivity debug printout (pure printf stdout). Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md); also no digiTS stdout-print analogue. PLANNING.md §5 case (b).
MOS1sSetup = sensitivity setup (assigns MOS1senParmNo into a SENstruct). Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).
MOS1sUpdate = sensitivity update (recomputes charge sensitivities into the SENstruct). Sensitivity is NOT implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).

MOS1temp = per-model + per-instance temperature pass. Maps to MosfetAnalogElement.computeTemperature() + computeTempParams() (mosfet.ts:398-526, 870-880), cited line-for-line against mos1temp.c. Both hunks are model/instance-loop accessor-macro renames only.

MOS1trunc = LTE/timestep contribution (CKTterr on the three Meyer gate caps qgs/qgd/qgb). Maps to MosfetAnalogElement.getLteTimestep() (mosfet.ts:1739-1771), which calls cktTerr on exactly those three pairs. The single hunk is the model/instance-loop accessor-macro rename only.

Automake libmos3_la_SOURCES list. digiTS has no autotools build; MOS3 registers via Mosfet3N/Mosfet3P Definitions in register-all.ts. Both hunks only drop the deleted mos3dest.c/mos3mdel.c source entries (themselves NO-COUNTERPART C-heap-free files).

IFparm MOS3mPTable[] model-param table - the source of truth for the level-3 model param set; counterpart is mosfet3.ts MOSFET3_*_PARAM_DEFS / modelRegistry.paramDefs. Two hunks flip alias-row flags (delvt0 IOPR->IOPUR; input_delta IOPR->IOP); the aliased params (delvto/input_delta) are present and unchanged. PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass (no v26 MOS3 baseline in digiTS to apply onto).

MOS3acLoad AC small-signal companion load -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.stampAc(). AC is implemented (analysis-scope.md; project_ac_solver_unified). Hunk is MOS3nextModel/MOS3instances/MOS3nextInstance accessor-macro renames only; AC conductances/cap admittances unchanged. PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.

MOS3ask integer-id IFvalue getter dispatcher (which-id switch returning IFvalue). digiTS has no integer-id ask API - params/outputs are read by name from the property bag / getPinCurrents. Three hunks are MOS3modPtr(here) accessor-macro renames inside the CAPGS/CAPGD/CAPGB overlap-cap getter cases; the underlying quantities exist in the reconstructed device, but the integer-id getter mechanism has no digiTS counterpart (same disposition as dio/jfet2 ask/mask).

MOS3convTest convergence test (cdhat/cbhat current-prediction). In the digiTS unified-interface model the check is folded inline into load() at the Check-flag site (mos3load.c:1045-1051) incrementing ctx.noncon; conceptually Mosfet3AnalogElement.checkConvergence. Hunk is accessor-macro renames only. PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.

Instance/model structs + state #defines + param-id enums. Four hunks: h001 noise-source enum + sMOS3instance GENinstance plumbing + const node fields (NC); h002 removes the old noise #define block + surrounds the NONOISE MOS3nVar array (NC); h003 sMOS3model GENmodel plumbing (NC); h004 device/model param-id #define->enum reformat - digiTS has no IFparm integer-id dispatch (params resolve by name). The MOS3 state-slot layout (MOSFET3_SCHEMA, 17 slots) is rebuilt by the reconstruction, not from this header.

MOS3delete - the v41 form is a C-heap FREE() teardown (FREE(inst->MOS3sens)); the v26 form unlinked one instance from a linked list. digiTS is GC-managed; no allocator, no destructor, no instance list, no sensitivity struct. Both hunks are device teardown.
Whole-file deletion of MOS3destroy - a C-heap FREE() loop releasing every MOS3model/MOS3instance. digiTS is GC-managed; no model/instance lists. File deleted in v41.

MOS3disto distortion stamp, entered only under D_TWOF1/D_THRF1/D_F1MF2/D_F1PF2/D_2F1MF2 Volterra modes. Distortion not implemented (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename inside the distortion-mode-gated loop.
MOS3dSetup distortion setup (precomputes the cross-derivative Volterra kernels consumed by MOS3disto). Distortion not implemented (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

C extern-prototype header. The single hunk only removes the extern decls of the deleted heap fns (MOS3destroy/MOS3mDelete) and re-signatures MOS3delete to the GENinstance teardown form. digiTS has no prototype headers; signatures are TS class members. No surviving declaration change with a counterpart.

MOS3getic .ic/UIC initial-condition capture (registered as DEVsetic; grabs icVBS/icVDS/icVGS from external node voltages when not given). digiTS has no per-element setic/getic engine hook - DEFER (non-blocking), same disposition as jfet2 getic (OQ-JFET2-GETIC) and mes getic. The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

SPICEdev MOS3info dispatch struct converted to C99 designated initialisers. digiTS has no SPICEdev table - registration is the reconstructed Mosfet3N/Mosfet3P component definitions in register-all.ts, method binding is which methods the element class implements. The only non-cosmetic change is DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set NULL (the deleted heap fns); every surviving function-pointer disposition is unchanged. No new slot, default, or capability.

MOS3load DC/transient companion load - the level-3 semi-empirical drain-current core (moseq3: XJ short-channel, ETA static feedback, THETA mobility modulation, VMAX velocity saturation, KAPPA channel-length modulation) plus bulk diodes, Meyer caps, charge integration and Y-matrix stamps -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.load(). Hunk is accessor-macro renames only; the level-3 arithmetic is unchanged v26->v41. PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.
Whole-file deletion of MOS3mDelete - a C-heap FREE() unlinking one MOS3model from the model list and freeing its instances. digiTS is GC-managed; no model list. File deleted in v41.

MOS3noise noise analysis (noizDens[MOS3NSRCS] thermal/flicker densities, NOISE_ADD_OUTVAR plot names). Noise not implemented (analysis-scope.md). Three hunks: h001 removes a dead char name[] local, h002 accessor renames, h003 NOISE_ADD_OUTVAR macro refactor of the plot-name registration. Whole file belongs to noise.

MOS3param instance-param setter (m/w/l/as/ad/ps/pd/nrs/nrd/off/icvbs/icvds/icvgs/temp/dtemp/ic) -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.setParam()/constructor. h001 is the cp_getvar("scale",...) signature bump (extra arg) + switch-spacing cosmetics (scale is upstream in digiTS, no cp_getvar global - same convention as MOS1); h002 adds explicit FALLTHROUGH comments on the MOS3_IC vector parse (behavior unchanged, 3->2->1 D-S/G-S/B-S fallthrough). PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.
MOS3pzLoad(..., SPcomplex *s) pole-zero load - stamps the complex admittance for the PZ sweep. Pole-zero not implemented (analysis-scope.md). The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

MOS3sAcLoad sensitivity AC-load - operates on ckt->CKTsenInfo / info->SENparms / MOS3senParmNo. digiTS has no per-device sensitivity (no CKTsenInfo/SenCond/SENstruct). Two hunks: h001 accessor renames inside the PERTURBATION loop, h002 an (int) cast on MOS3sens_l in the senParmNo index. Whole file belongs to sensitivity.

MOS3setup model defaults + per-instance prime-node alloc + 22-cell TSTALLOC (PORT -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.setup); MOS3unsetup node teardown (NO-COUNTERPART - digiTS has no device teardown, engine rebuilt fresh per compile). Three hunks: h001/h002 MOS3setup accessor renames (PORT); h003 the MOS3unsetup drain/source-prime delete-order rewrite (>0 guards) -> NO-COUNTERPART.

MOS3sLoad sensitivity load - computes charge sensitivities (MOS3dphi*_dl/dw) keyed on info->SENparms/MOS3senParmNo. digiTS has no per-device sensitivity. Two hunks: h001 accessor renames, h002 an (int) cast on MOS3sens_l in the senParmNo index. Whole file belongs to sensitivity.
MOS3sPrint sensitivity debug printout (printf of LEVEL 3 MOSFET sensitivity values). digiTS has no sensitivity analysis and no per-device stdout. The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

MOS3sSetup sensitivity setup (SENstruct *info) - assigns MOS3senParmNo into the sensitivity parameter table. digiTS has no SENstruct/sensitivity analysis. The single hunk is the accessor-macro rename.

MOS3sUpdate sensitivity update - recomputes charge sensitivities (MOS3dphi*_dl/dw) into the sensitivity tables. digiTS has no per-device sensitivity. Two hunks: h001 accessor renames, h002 an (int) cast on MOS3sens_l in the senParmNo index. Whole file belongs to sensitivity.

MOS3temp temperature pass - model preprocessing (oxideCapFactor, gamma/phi-from-nsub, alpha, coeffDepLayWidth, narrowFactor) + per-instance corrections (tTransconductance/tSurfMob/tPhi/tVto/tVbi/tSatCur, junction-cap temp scaling, vcrit) -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.computeTemperature()/_computeTempInstance(). Two hunks are accessor-macro renames over the model walk (h001) and instance walk (h002). PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.

MOS3trunc LTE/timestep - CKTterr on the three Meyer-gate charges MOS3qgs/MOS3qgd/MOS3qgb -> Mosfet3AnalogElement.getLteTimestep() (cktTerr on QGS/QGD/QGB). The single hunk is accessor-macro renames over the model/instance walk. PENDING, blocked by mos3#recon/wholeClass.

Automake source-list fragment (libres_la_SOURCES). C build system: digiTS has no autotools build; components register via src/core/registry.ts. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact. The single hunk only deletes the resdel.c/resdest.c/resmdel.c entries — all three are themselves NO-COUNTERPART C-heap-free artifacts deleted in v41. No behavioral content.

IFparm RESpTable / RESmPTable parameter-name tables. digiTS keys params by name string (defineModelParams in resistor.ts: RESISTOR_PARAM_DEFS), no integer-id IFparm table and no parser-driven generic ask/set. Three hunks: h001 adds the IOPPR("r") instance redirect-alias for resistance; h002 changes the `tc1` row to IOPUR (redirect flag) and adds the `tce` instance row + `noise` redirect-alias; h003 changes several model rows to redirect-flag macro variants (IOPZR/IOPQR/IOPQOR/IOPXR) and adds the new model params tce/lf/wf/ef as IFparm rows. All three are C parser-table plumbing (the table maps integer ids ↔ names; digiTS has neither). The params the new rows declare (tce belongs to the reconstructed conductance model; lf/wf/ef are noise-model params) are realised by the reconstruction's defineModelParams, not by this IFparm table — resolved per hunk (all three NO-COUNTERPART, see roster + Q1).

RESask — the SPICE IFparm instance-parameter value getter (switch(which) integer-id dispatch feeding the parser/front-end). digiTS has no integer-id ask API; instance values are read as TypeScript class members (e.g. getPinCurrents on ResistorAnalogElement is the load-time current path, not this parser-facing getter). PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C parser-API artifact — same disposition as ind/mutask.c. All four hunks edit the getter body: h001 drops the `*= RESm` / `/= RESm` rescaling from the conduct/resist/acConduct/acResist getters (a consequence of v41 folding RESm into RESconduct), h002 adds the RES_TCE getter case, h003/h004 replace TMALLOC+strcpy error construction with tprintf and change the RES_CURRENT/RES_POWER getters to `(V+ - V-) *= RESconduct` (the m-fold consequence). Every change lives inside the no-counterpart ask dispatch.

VCVSsetup maps to VCVSAnalogElement.setup (TSTALLOC sequence vcvs.ts:159-179). Three hunks resolved per hunk: h001 (setup accessor renames) and h002 (TSTALLOC *ptr->*Ptr renames) PENDING; h003 (VCVSunsetup branch-node teardown) NO-COUNTERPART — digiTS rebuilds a fresh engine per compile(), no unsetup path.
VCVSsLoad sensitivity load; body gated on here->VCVSsenParmNo. Sensitivity not implemented (analysis-scope.md). PLANNING.md §5 case (b).
